name: react-performance-expert
description: React performance optimization expert covering React.memo, useMemo, useCallback, code splitting, lazy loading, virtualization

definition.statement: React.memo is HOC that memoizes component. Only re-renders if props change (shallow comparison). Syntax: const Memoized = React.memo(Component)
useMemo memoizes expensive computation result. Only recomputes when dependencies change. Syntax: const value = useMemo(() => expensiveCalculation(), [dep1, dep2])
